comment: Domain-legitimate molecular anomalies that pass chemistry sanity but fail heuristic ranges in tools/verify-molecular.mjs. Maintain via manual review only — do NOT add an entry without verifying the value against PubChem and recording the chemistry justification.

allowlist.name: Glyceryl Trioleate
allowlist.reason: Triglyceride (C57H104O6); high logP correct for triester of oleic acid

allowlist.name: alpha-Tocopherol
allowlist.reason: Vitamin E; chromanol + C16 phytyl tail; just above heuristic ceiling

allowlist.name: Ethanol
allowlist.reason: Common solvent; below 50 g/mol heuristic floor
